name: seqwalk
description: Walk through AI-written code with interactive HTML sequence diagrams.

interface.shortDescription: Turn confusing code flow into interactive review diagrams.
interface.longDescription: SeqWalk gives Cursor a reusable skill and rule for explaining code execution flow as scrollable HTML sequence diagrams. If it helps you review AI-written code faster, please buy the maintainer a coffee through the support section in the repository.
defaultPrompt: Use SeqWalk to diagram this code flow.
Create an interactive HTML sequence diagram.
Review this AI-written flow with SeqWalk.
